announcements.text: Intimation Of Call Option Exercised By The Bank For The Bond ISIN INE692A08144 30 May - Union Bank will redeem ₹850 crore bond ISIN INE692A08144 on 24-06-2026; record date 09-06-2026.
Book Closure For Annual General Meeting (AGM) And Cut Off/ Record Date For Dividend 27 May

Convening Of 24Th Annual General Meeting (AGM) Of The Shareholders Of The Bank, Book Closure For The Purpose Of AGM And Payment Of Dividend. 27 May - Union Bank AGM on 10 July 2026; book closure 4-10 July and record date 3 July for dividend.
Outcome Of The Meeting Of Board Held On May 26, 2026. 26 May - Board approved capital plan to raise up to ₹8,000 crore on 26 May 2026.
Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of The Meeting Of Board Held On May 26, 2026. 26 May - Board approved capital plan to raise up to ₹8,000 crore, including ₹3,000 crore equity and ₹5,000 crore bonds.
